articles.title: Thushara Fails IPL 2026 Fitness Test, RCB Denied NOC
articles.what_this_means: Sri Lankan pacer Thushara has been blocked from joining RCB for IPL 2026 after failing BCCI's mandatory fitness test. Meanwhile, KKR's Pathirana and LSG's Hasaranga are still awaiting their test results, making this a developing story that could reshape the entire IPL 2026 season for overseas player availability.

articles.title: Australia Cricket Crisis: IPL Money Threatening Test Cricket 2026
articles.what_this_means: Australia's captain is warning that franchise cricket money—especially from the IPL—is pulling players away from Test cricket contracts. If Cricket Australia can't compete financially with the IPL, their national teams will suffer, potentially weakening future India vs Australia test series and threatening the survival of Test cricket globally.

articles.title: AI in Education: Global Strategies & Your Career Impact 2026
articles.what_this_means: Global governments are finalizing AI-in-education policies faster than before. For Indian tech professionals in the US, this creates opportunities in EdTech ML roles—especially if you understand both policy and code. Machine learning salaries in education are rising for specialized engineers who can handle privacy, compliance, and ChatGPT alternatives.

articles.title: Real Estate Stock Crash 2026: Should Tech Professionals Invest Now?
articles.what_this_means: Real estate stocks have crashed 22-32% in 2026 due to IT layoffs and geopolitical tensions. Indian tech professionals should consider selective purchases of quality large-cap players, with April's RBI MPC meeting serving as a key decision point that could trigger a recovery in valuations and mortgage affordability.

articles.title: AI Gender Gap 2026: How It's Affecting Your Tech Career
articles.what_this_means: New data shows AI adoption is widening the gender gap in tech—but Indian engineers who master AI tools for developers, learn fairness/bias concepts, and position themselves as AI architects (not replacements) are securing premium salaries and job security. Your move: skill up in prompt engineering and responsible AI now; it's worth 15-22% more in machine learning salaries.

articles.title: Mohanlal Gets Delhi Court Protection for Personality Rights 2026
articles.what_this_means: Malayalam star Mohanlal just won interim protection for his personality rights from India's Delhi High Court—a landmark ruling that affects how streaming platforms handle celebrity images across Netflix, Prime, and Hotstar. This strengthens legal protections for all Indian actors in the digital age and ensures more authentic content for diaspora audiences.

articles.title: Project Hail Mary Gets All 34 IMAX Screens in India 2026
articles.what_this_means: Fan power just secured Project Hail Mary on all 34 IMAX screens in India after Sony Pictures initially landed only 6. Mumbai's Eros Cinema added a rare 3:45 AM weekend show, proving audience demand drives theatrical strategy. Streaming comes later; catch it in IMAX now.
